title: Unit 5 – G12: Adverbialsätze (Linking Words)
description: Verbinde Sätze mit den richtigen Bindewörtern: because, so that, although, when, while, before, after, as soon as, whenever, until

items.question: Kausalatz (Grund/weil): Bindewort auf Englisch
Finalsatz (Zweck/damit): Bindewort auf Englisch
Konzessivsatz (obwohl): Bindewort auf Englisch
Temporalsatz (nachdem): Bindewort
Temporalsatz (sobald): Bindewort
Temporalsatz (bevor): Bindewort
Temporalsatz (bis): Bindewort
Temporalsatz (wenn/als): Bindewort
Temporalsatz (jedes Mal wenn): Bindewort
Temporalsatz (während): Bindewort
Carol wrote to an agony aunt ___ she had a problem.
Write to Ruby ___ she can give you advice.
They had a big fight ___ they were best friends.
___ I spoke to my friend, I felt much better.
Things often get better ___ you talk to somebody.
___ they had an argument, Carol spent a lot of her free time with her friend.
Never give out your address ___ you've really met someone face-to-face.
Ask your parents ___ you need advice.
___ you want to put photos of other people online, ask them first.
Your friend asked for you ___ you were sleeping.
Joe: I like your magazine ___ it's always got interesting news about my favourite stars.
Ginny: I buy TeenLife ___ I get my pocket money from my parents.
___ I read Ruby's advice, I think she really understands our problems. (Lisa)
Michael: Ruby has learned a lot about teenage problems ___ she can help people with her advice.
Sheila: ___ I didn't like the make-up, I'm going to buy TeenLife again.
